Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Tired of the same old chicken recipes? Emeril's prepares two exciting new chicken recipes.
Video.title: Chicken with a Twist

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Scott Maurer compose an entire meal around Louisiana oysters.
Video.title: with Scott Maurer

Video.summary: Emeril shares the tale of two Louisiana surfers who stumbled on the perfect seaside snack!
Video.title: A Surfer's Discovery: Sea Beans

Video.summary: Emeril turns up the heat and turns the spotlight on Louisiana hot sauce!
Video.title: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Image.alt: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Creole cream cheese, which was almost lost until one family farm helped save it.
Video.title: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Image.alt: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Video.summary: Subtley sweet, Emeril shows you how to make the most of figs.
Video.title: Fig Envy

Video.summary: Emeril prepares dishes with saffron grown right in the southern United States.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: Dine like a Hoosier with chicken fried steak, barbecue chicken, and sugar cream pie.
Video.title: Indianapolis Colts

Video.summary: After a visit to Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite recipes.
Video.title: Pecan Paradise

Video.summary: Cozy up with Emeril's warming and comforting classics.
Video.title: Comforting Classics

Video.summary: Emeril's friends Maggie Long and Cyrus Lester share a meal incorporating fresh mushrooms from their farm.
Video.title: with Mushroom Maggie's

Video.summary: Steak au Poivre, Flambeed Tangerines
Video.title: Flambe

Video.summary: Denver superfan Catherine Highland, aka The Bronco Babe, grills up dishes to honor the state of Colorado.
Video.title: Denver

Video.summary: Emeril helps you wake up guests with coffee-inspired recipes!
Video.title: New Orleans Coffee

Video.summary: Emeril and Buffalo Bills superfan Lindsey Kszos takes inspiration from her city's famous wings.
Video.title: Buffalo

Video.summary: Baby Back Ribs, Braised Short Ribs, Cilantro Potato Salad
Video.title: Ribs

Video.summary: Basic Risotto, Risotto Cakes
Video.title: Risotto

Video.summary: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp?
Video.title: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Image.alt: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Video.summary: Basic Pizza Dough, Portuguese Pizza, Lobster Pizza
Video.title: Creative Pizza

Video.summary: Chocolate French Toast, Norman's Down Under French Toast
Video.title: French Toast

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Morning Glory, an invasive vegetable grown only by special permission.
Video.title: Illegal Greens: Morning Glory

Video.summary: Anthony's Firecracker Shrimp, Shrimp Soup
Video.title: Shrimp

Video.summary: Deviled Crab, Oysters Mosca
Video.title: More Louisiana Specials

Video.summary: Emeril shares his favorite burger recipes.
Video.title: Hamburger 101

Video.summary: Country Ham, Beignets and Cafe au Lait, Creme Brulee, Mocha Cheesecake
Video.title: Coffee Talk

Video.summary: Tuna Salad with Wasabi, Celery Mashed Potatoes, Red Fish Almondine
Video.title: Creative Gulf Fish

Video.summary: Mint Julep, Canape of Blue Cheese and Walnuts, Shrimp Toast, Oyster Rissoles
Video.title: Canapes

Video.summary: Mexican Chocolate Drink, Cinnamon Venison, Pork Tacos, Cinnamon Creme Brulee
Video.title: Cooking with Cinnamon

Video.summary: Savory Pain Perdu, Eggplant with Red Pepper Panini, Duck-Stuffed Pitas
Video.title: Classic Hot Sandwiches

Video.summary: For a Carolina-inspired tailgate, wow your guests with Emeril's take on some hometown faves.
Video.title: Carolina Panthers

Video.summary: Basic Gnocchi, Goat Cheese Gnocchi
Video.title: Gnocchi

Video.summary: Bread Pudding Souffle, Whiskey Sauce
Video.title: Souffles

Video.summary: Salt-Fried Shrimp, Asian Beef and Shrimp Soup, Date and Pecan Firecrackers
Video.title: Szechuan

Video.summary: Emeril is going back to the basics. Whether you're a novice cook or an advanced chef, you'll love these recipes: vegetable soup, and roast chicken served with roasted root vegetables
Video.title: Back to Basics: Cooking School 101

Video.summary: Emeril prepares satisfying soups.
Video.title: International Soups

Video.summary: Emeril prepares oysters and mussels, including oysters on the half shell with three sauces.
Video.title: Bivalves: Oysters and Mussels

Video.summary: It's a pizza party! Emeril will how you how to make basic dough and add classic toppings.
Video.title: Making Pizza at Home

Video.summary: Emeril shows a group of bachelors how to impress with a classic and affordable French dinner.
Video.title: Frugal French
